title: await inside a loop
message: Async callback in .map runs the awaits one after another, so it is slow. Use `await Promise.all(items.map(async (item) => {...}))` to run them at the same time
help: Collect the items, then use `await Promise.all(items.map(...))` so independent work runs at the same time
